'''âb-dh-b''' ('''kabadhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preact|preact]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preact|preact]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kabadhab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibadhab|thibadhab]] || [[word:jibadhab|jibadhab]] || [[word:shibadhab|shibadhab]] || [[word:kibadhab|kibadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubadhab|thuthubadhab]] || [[word:jujubadhab|jujubadhab]] || [[word:shushubadhab|shushubadhab]] || [[word:kukubadhab|kukubadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubadhab|thubadhab]] || [[word:jubadhab|jubadhab]] || [[word:shubadhab|shubadhab]] || [[word:kubadhab|kubadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubadhab|thubadhab]] || [[word:jubadhab|jubadhab]] || [[word:shubadhab|shubadhab]] || [[word:kubadhab|kubadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebadhab|thebadhab]] || [[word:jebadhab|jebadhab]] || [[word:shebadhab|shebadhab]] || [[word:kebadhab|kebadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobadhab|thothobadhab]] || [[word:jojobadhab|jojobadhab]] || [[word:shoshobadhab|shoshobadhab]] || [[word:kokobadhab|kokobadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobadhab|thobadhab]] || [[word:jobadhab|jobadhab]] || [[word:shobadhab|shobadhab]] || [[word:kobadhab|kobadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadhab|thobadhab]] || [[word:jobadhab|jobadhab]] || [[word:shobadhab|shobadhab]] || [[word:kobadhab|kobadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbadhab|thĂŠbadhab]] || [[word:jĂŠbadhab|jĂŠbadhab]] || [[word:shĂŠbadhab|shĂŠbadhab]] || [[word:kĂŠbadhab|kĂŠbadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabadhab|thathabadhab]] || [[word:jajabadhab|jajabadhab]] || [[word:shashabadhab|shashabadhab]] || [[word:kakabadhab|kakabadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabadhab|thabadhab]] || [[word:jabadhab|jabadhab]] || [[word:shabadhab|shabadhab]] || [[word:kabadhab|kabadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabadhab|thabadhab]] || [[word:jabadhab|jabadhab]] || [[word:shabadhab|shabadhab]] || [[word:kabadhab|kabadhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabadhab|shabadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabadhab|goshabadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabadhab|gokishabadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabadhabnĂŒ|shabadhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabadhabnknĂŒ|goshabadhabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadhabnĂŒ|gokishabadhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabadhabshĂ«|shabadhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkshĂ«|goshabadhabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabadhabshĂ«|gokishabadhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadhabro|shabadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkro|goshabadhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadhabro|gokishabadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadhabmu|shabadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkmu|goshabadhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadhabmu|gokishabadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabadhabsher|shabadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabadhabnksher|goshabadhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabadhabsher|gokishabadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabadhabng|shabadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkng|goshabadhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabadhabng|gokishabadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabadhabya|shabadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkya|goshabadhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabadhabya|gokishabadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabadhabyam|shabadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkyam|goshabadhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabadhabyam|gokishabadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabadhabnĂŒshĂ«|shabadhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabadhabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabadhabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabadhabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabadhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadhabnĂŒro|shabadhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadhabnknĂŒro|goshabadhabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadhabnĂŒro|gokishabadhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadhabnĂŒmu|shabadhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadhabnknĂŒmu|goshabadhabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadhabnĂŒmu|gokishabadhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabadhabshĂ«nĂŒ|shabadhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabadhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadhabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabadhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadhabshĂ«ro|shabadhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkshĂ«ro|goshabadhabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadhabshĂ«ro|gokishabadhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadhabshĂ«mu|shabadhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkshĂ«mu|goshabadhabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadhabshĂ«mu|gokishabadhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabadhabronĂŒ|shabadhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkronĂŒ|goshabadhabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadhabronĂŒ|gokishabadhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabadhabroshĂ«|shabadhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkroshĂ«|goshabadhabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabadhabroshĂ«|gokishabadhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadhabromu|shabadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkromu|goshabadhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadhabromu|gokishabadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabadhabmunĂŒ|shabadhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkmunĂŒ|goshabadhabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadhabmunĂŒ|gokishabadhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabadhabmushĂ«|shabadhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkmushĂ«|goshabadhabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabadhabmushĂ«|gokishabadhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadhabmuro|shabadhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadhabnkmuro|goshabadhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadhabmuro|gokishabadhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
